item: Purpose theater and narrative extraction review
claim_context: purpose practice gap and employee/stakeholder story use audit
governance_note: Medium-priority editorial review recommended. Risk signals are elevated. Review power, omissions, ethical framing, and distortion. Record note: Escalate organizational stories that turn purpose into pressure or people into brand proof.

claim_context: automated culture summary and omitted dissent audit
governance_note: Medium-priority editorial review recommended. Risk signals are elevated. Review power, omissions, ethical framing, and distortion. Record note: Review AI-generated culture and change stories for omitted dissent, privacy risk, false alignment, context loss, and weak human review.
